parameters.query: INSERT INTO patients (phone, name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ({{ JSON.stringify($json.phone) }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.pushName) }}, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.name, patients.name), updated_at = NOW() RETURNING *;
SELECT * FROM conversation_state WHERE phone = {{ JSON.stringify($json.phone) }};

INSERT INTO conversation_log (phone, intent, confidence, message_text, response_text, message_id, direction, created_at) VALUES ({{ JSON.stringify($json.phone) }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.intent) }}, {{ $json.confidence }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.text) }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.reply) }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.messageId) }}, 'inbound', NOW()), ({{ JSON.stringify($json.phone) }}, {{ JSON.stringify($json.intent) }}, {{ $json.confidence }}, NULL, {{ JSON.stringify($json.reply) }}, NULL, 'outbound', NOW());
